The '''Julevian system''', also known as the '''Sernpidal system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] that was located on the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], in the [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]].
